arms_mandatory_baselines: plain-style twin cells — the STYLE NULL: byte-matched content in non-NSM register (tier-2: the pinned S6-inverse plainification of the SAME canonical gloss; measured pair-difference 0.94)

truth-wrong deranged-donor cells — the SCRAMBLE-CONTROL analog on this instrument: content decoupled from the headword by a length-sorted cyclic-shift derangement (fixed-point-free), at matched length and matched style
tier-1 wn31 cells — kernel-free external-gold instrument arm (truth-manipulation gate; no probe word has any kernel record, so judge gold CANNOT coincide with any kernel accept test)

kernel-as-text / shuffled-kernel nulls: N/A by Law-1 — no model is grounded and no kernel vector crosses any interface; their control ROLES are carried by the two cell families above (design doc section 3.1)

dependent_vars.definition: judge label == 'yes' on the single-stimulus S1 acceptance question; 'no' and the mandatory 'cannot-say' escape are both non-acceptance (escape rates reported per cell); labels normalised by the runner to {yes,no,cannot-say}, anything else = unlabelled (instrument accounting)
dependent_vars.name: accept

dependent_vars.definition: label == 'cannot-say'; reported per cell, never an endpoint
dependent_vars.name: escape

n_planned.adjudication_protocol:
blind, stateless per-item LLM invocations; per-judge pinned item order dts/1|judge-

|20260710; judges see only the question bytes (never tier/truth/style/donor/provenance/'kernel'); S1 fit+identification stem with the S6 register-immunity instruction byte-identical across cells; mandatory cannot-say escape; judge specs staged by ops amendment into the harness_manifest placeholder BEFORE any adjudication call; any HUMAN who judges d-ts items is permanently ineligible as an f2b-transfer judge (LS-4)
n_planned.consumer_rule: pre-declared, conservative: ONLY a PASS lifts the style-leak guard on f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement readings; FAIL or INCONCLUSIVE leaves the guard in force — citations of A1p=0.95 (and, under the FORK-4 stipulation, the human Stage-1 A) must then carry this record's measured interval as a style-bias band
n_planned.power: TOST at margin 0.10, concept-cluster bootstrap: with paired-discordance q<=0.20 and ICC~0.2 (design effect ~2, effective n ~300; STIPULATED planning constants, design doc section 3.5), power >=0.99 at true effect 0 and >=0.86 at true |effect| 0.03; the FAIL direction is powered only for leaks >=~0.15, priced by the pre-declared conservative consumer rule (only PASS lifts the style-leak guard)
n_planned.timing: freeze BEFORE f2b-transfer Stage-2 unblinds or this probe loses confirmatory standing next to it (R-2)

endpoints.test: STYLE MAIN EFFECT AT MATCHED TRUTH, tier-2 (kernel-bytes) pairs: mean over evaluable (judge, content-pair) of [accept(nsm) - accept(plain)], equal-weight over the 3 pinned judges, both truth levels pooled; concept-cluster percentile bootstrap (resample the 100 covered concepts, B=10000, PRNG seed 20260710); TOST per P8 section 1.5 = the 5th-95th percentile interval lies inside (-0.10, +0.10). PASS (style-robust) iff TOST passes; FAIL (style-leaky) iff the interval lies entirely beyond +0.10 or below -0.10; else INCONCLUSIVE. No endpoint scores agreement with truth gold — the estimand is a style CONTRAST, so judge gold cannot coincide with any kernel accept test (oracle-leakage guard, design doc section 6.1)

H-FALSE-ACCEPT-INFLATION: one-sided (bootstrap) test that the tier-2 truth-WRONG style effect > 0 (NSM shaping inflates false acceptance); Holm within the single pre-declared family F-secondary(ts) = {wrong_cell_style_inflation, correct_cell_style_tost, judge1p_style_tost} at family alpha 0.05
tier-2 truth-CORRECT style effect TOST at margin 0.10 (simple effect complementing the wrong-cell member); Holm within F-secondary(ts)
judge-p1 (GPT-5.6-Sol — the f2b-transfer-llmproxy judge-1p family) style effect TOST at margin 0.10: protects the A1p=0.95 reading specifically; Holm within F-secondary(ts)
INSTRUMENT gate: >= 0.95 of the 2352 scored (item, judge) pairs labelled; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never a hypothesis outcome
INSTRUMENT gate: every judge labels >= 0.90 of scored items AND no judge is inverted on the kernel-free tier-1 truth manipulation (per-judge truth effect > 0); failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID

INSTRUMENT gate (kernel-independent): tier-1 pooled truth effect (accept correct - accept wrong, paired within word x style, wn31 external gold) >= 0.30 at n >= 200 — if judges cannot separate own from deranged definitions on kernel-free ground, acceptance does not measure content and no style reading is interpretable; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID

INSTRUMENT gate: tier-2 content-pair difference fraction >= 0.80 AND NSM-marker reduction fraction >= 0.80 — forbids reading equivalence off a null style manipulation (FORK-1 false-reassurance guard); failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID
INSTRUMENT gate: >= 0.90 of truth-wrong cells within +/-35% of the correct twin's token length (truth must not be cued by length); failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID

INSTRUMENT gate: agreement >= 0.85 over >= 48 duplicate judgments (stability floor; trivially high for temperature-0 judges — disclosed as a floor, not judge-quality evidence); failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on any verdict. R0 — no host model, no rung claims, scale_language none. A PASS licenses exactly: for THIS pinned 3-LLM judge pool (GPT-5.6-Sol, GPT-5.5, Claude-Haiku-4.5; two of three same-vendor, disclosed), under the S1 fit+identification standards WITH the S6 register-immunity instruction (the condition actually in force on the f2b line), in single-stimulus yes/no/cannot-say acceptance format, on d-ts (100 covered-concept canonical glosses vs their pinned S6-inverse plainifications, and 96 wn31 words vs a MEASURED-near-null tier-1 transform that carries NO endpoint), the style main effect on acceptance at matched truth is within +/-0.10 absolute — and the style-leak guard on f2b-line LLM-JUDGE endorsement readings is lifted AT THAT MARGIN. It does NOT license: any claim that kernel content is correct (no endpoint scores gold agreement); any H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC adjudication (that is f2b-transfer's alone); transfer to HUMAN judges (registered extrapolation, FORK-3 — the pending human Stage-1 A is NOT cleared by this probe); transfer to the f2b MCQ/best-fit format beyond the FORK-4 STIPULATION (single-stimulus acceptance is a different judging act; resolution path = MCQ successor if LEAKY); margins tighter than 0.10 (FORK-5); other style transforms, other concepts, other corpora, or any coverage-general claim — kernel-expressibility coverage is 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on ONE incomplete kernel-v0 instance, restated mandatorily; the tier-2 concepts are 100 of those same 108 covered concepts and nothing here extends coverage. A FAIL is symmetrically scoped: it establishes a style-bias band for THIS judge class on THIS format; it amends no frozen record and does not by itself refute kernel content (a style-leaky judge is an instrument fact about judges). The tier-2 truth split rests on the STIPULATED own-gloss-is-correct reading (design doc section 6.1); the primary pools both truth levels so no verdict rests on that stipulation.
hypotheses: H-STYLE-ROBUST (primary): at matched truth and matched content, NSM-shaped vs plain surface changes judge acceptance by no more than +/-0.10 absolute (TOST equivalence) for the pinned judge pool on the tier-2 kernel-bytes pairs; if true, f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement readings are not materially style/familiarity-leaky at this margin

H-STYLE-LEAKY (the alternative under test, symmetric): the style main effect exceeds the +/-0.10 margin (either direction); if demonstrated, every f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement reading (including f2b-transfer-llmproxy A1p=0.95) carries a measured style-bias band and cannot be read as pure content endorsement

H-FALSE-ACCEPT-INFLATION (Holm secondary, the live threat named by the llmproxy envelope / ASM-0021): NSM shaping RAISES acceptance of semantically WRONG content (one-sided style effect on truth-wrong tier-2 cells > 0) — the exact channel that would fabricate endorsement under H-CIRC

H-INSTRUMENT (gate, never a hypothesis outcome): judges separate own from deranged definitions on kernel-free external gold (tier-1 wn31 truth effect >= 0.30), the tier-2 style manipulation is real (>=0.80 pair-difference), labels are stable (retest >= 0.85) — failures are INSTRUMENT-INVALID
kill_criterion_verbatim: truthstyle-2x2 kills (all on the tier-2 primary estimand, concept-cluster bootstrap B=10000 seed 20260710, margin +/-0.10 absolute): (a) STYLE-LEAK KILL — the 90% interval (two one-sided 95% bounds) of the style main effect lies entirely beyond +0.10 or entirely below -0.10 => FAIL = style-leaky: every f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement reading (f2b-transfer-llmproxy A1p = 0.95 included, and — under the FORK-4 format-transfer stipulation — the pending human Stage-1 A) must thereafter carry this record's measured interval as a style-bias band; this kills the 'judge endorsement reads as pure content endorsement' interpretation at this judge class, NOT any frozen record and NOT the kernel-content claim itself. (b) EQUIVALENCE — TOST pass (interval inside the margin) => PASS = style-robust at margin 0.10 for THIS pool/format; the style-leak guard is lifted at that margin and no further. (c) NEITHER => INCONCLUSIVE, and the PRE-DECLARED CONSERVATIVE CONSUMER RULE holds: the guard stays in force — an underpowered straddle can never be cited as reassurance. Degeneracy discipline: label-coverage, pool inversion, truth-manipulation (kernel-free tier-1 gold), style-fidelity (manipulation strength 0.94 measured at build; gate 0.80), length-match, and retest failures are INSTRUMENT-INVALID by pre-registered gates — they can never read as PASS, FAIL, or NULL. Nulls require TOST (this record's primary IS the TOST).

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

model_revisions.judge-p1-gpt56sol: gpt-5.6-sol via npx -y @openai/codex@0.144.1, reasoning effort low — invocation form byte-derived from data/d-adj-t-llmproxy/judge-1p-invocation.md (sha pinned there); exact staged spec fills the harness_manifest placeholder

runner_constraints.harness: poc/truthstyle-2x2 (builder + style rules committed and sha-pinned in the harness_manifest placeholder; judge invocation specs staged by ops amendment BEFORE any adjudication call; d-ts labels pinned by ops amendment AFTER adjudication and BEFORE the final-phase record; the GLOBAL codex install is never upgraded while f2b-transfer judge runs are in flight)
runner_constraints.stage_discipline: freeze BEFORE f2b-transfer Stage-2 unblinds (R-2 timing, design doc section 7.1); mock (green, $0) precedes any paid adjudication; maintainer sign-off precedes spend; the runner never improvises — undecided situations are boundary stops back to Fable

title: truthstyle-2x2 — truth x style 2x2 adjudication probe: does NSM-shaped surface (vs plain, content-matched, length-matched, truth-matched) shift blind judge acceptance? Protects the interpretation of f2b-transfer judge-endorsement readings (A, A1p) against style/familiarity leakage; ONE primary = the style main effect on acceptance at matched truth with a pre-declared TOST equivalence margin of +/-0.10; pinned cross-vendor 3-LLM judge pool; deterministic items (NO LLM authorship); $0 GPU, bounded adjudication. TIMING-CRITICAL: must freeze before f2b-transfer Stage-2 unblinds (R-2).
